ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the team belongs to */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the team belongs to */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the division belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the division was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the conference belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the conference was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the league */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., Major, Minor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "loss" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "gb" REAL /* Games behind leader */,
  "gb_e" INTEGER /* Elimination number */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank within the division */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank within the conference */,
  "league_rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank in the league */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the team */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed by the team */,
  "home_record" TEXT /* Record at home games */,
  "away_record" TEXT /* Record at away games */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the standings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win/loss) */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game is played */,
  "stadium_city" TEXT /* City where the game is played */,
  "stadium_state" TEXT /* State where the game is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand (left, right, switch) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand (left, right) */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average (for pitchers) */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position (to reference a positions table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height_feet" INTEGER /* Height in feet */,
  "height_inches" INTEGER /* Height in inches */,
  "weight_pounds" REAL /* Weight in pounds */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "professional_experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of professional experience */,
  "player_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return from injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., strain, fracture) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "injury_location" TEXT /* Location of the injury (e.g., knee, shoulder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, team administrator, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
